title: App Development Services
seoTitle: Custom App Development Services | BarkinMad Studios
heading: Custom Apps, Prototypes & Business Tools
intro: BarkinMad Studios helps small businesses turn ideas into simple, practical digital tools.
description: Custom app development, prototypes, internal business tools, dashboards, workflow automation, and iPhone/iPad app development from BarkinMad Studios.

sections.heading: Custom App Development
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios can help design and build lightweight custom apps for small businesses, internal teams, and customer-facing projects.
Whether you need a simple mobile app, a focused business tool, or a prototype to test an idea, the aim is to build practical software without unnecessary complexity.

sections.heading: App Prototypes & Proof of Concepts
paragraphs: If you have an idea but are not ready for a full product build, a prototype can help test the concept quickly.
Prototypes are useful for exploring workflows, validating ideas, preparing investor conversations, or showing a working version to stakeholders before committing to larger development.

sections.heading: Internal Business Tools
paragraphs: Many businesses rely on spreadsheets, manual processes, or repeated admin tasks that could be improved with a simple digital tool.
BarkinMad Studios can help create internal tools, dashboards, workflow helpers, data entry screens, and lightweight automation systems that support day-to-day work.

sections.heading: Mobile Apps for iPhone and iPad
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios builds mobile apps for Apple platforms, with experience across Swift, SwiftUI, Game Center, StoreKit, cloud data, localisation, analytics, and app release workflows.
Projects can range from early prototypes to production-ready apps prepared for TestFlight and App Store release.

sections.heading: Why Work With BarkinMad Studios?
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios focuses on clear, practical software that solves real problems. The goal is to keep projects focused, understandable, and useful from the first version.
As an independent UK studio, BarkinMad Studios is well suited to small businesses, early-stage ideas, and focused digital projects where simplicity and speed matter.

sections.heading: Examples of Experience
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios has built mobile games, app companion tools, content-driven websites, cloud-hosted JSON systems, App Store releases, Game Center features, achievements, leaderboards, and shared progression systems.
This experience can be applied to business prototypes, custom apps, dashboards, and lightweight workflow tools.

sections.heading: Discuss a Project
paragraphs: Have an app idea, business tool, prototype, or workflow problem in mind? Get in touch to discuss whether BarkinMad Studios can help.
